note: Mixed (biased+random) training data dramatically improves specificity (80.8%→97.5%, 23FP→3FP). Sensitivity drops slightly (88.9%→83.3% at 0.95) but at optimal threshold 0.80 achieves sens=88.9% spec=97.5% F1=0.865. Just 1 TP short of 90% sensitivity on 18-epitope benchmark. A*01:01's restrictive motif (acidic P3 + aromatic P9) means borderline epitopes are hard to capture. Very close to passing.
